title: A New Idea to Save the AMOC? Dam the Bering Strait.
summary_full: Blocking the narrow waterway between Russia and Alaska could help stabilize a vulnerable system of ocean currents, scientists found in a study.
summary_public: Blocking the narrow waterway between Russia and Alaska could help stabilize a vulnerable system of ocean currents, scientists found in a study.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: waterway between Russia and Alaska could help
